description_long: This is a modern, multi-story apartment building with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The facade features large rectangular windows arranged in vertical and horizontal groupings, providing ample natural light to the interior. Two prominent balconies with wooden floors are visible, one on the first floor and another on the second, both partially recessed into the structure. The building is surrounded by a low boundary wall enclosing a small green yard. The main entrance is a single wooden door with glass panels, and there is a rooftop structure with an additional door, possibly for roof access. The exterior is finished in a light gray color, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance.
description: A modern, multi-story apartment building with large windows, recessed balconies, and a flat roof, finished in light gray with wooden accents. The structure is surrounded by a low wall and a small green yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two recessed balconies with wooden floors, and a series of vertically aligned windows.
description_view_1: Rear view with a plain facade, no windows or doors, and the surrounding yard visible.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting a large balcony, multiple windows, and the flat roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, a balcony, and the rooftop access door.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in vertical and horizontal groupings, with some symmetry on the front and side facades. The windows are mostly rectangular and evenly spaced, contributing to a balanced and modern appearance.
